data.description:
## Why

The plan-review gate is a 742-LOC bespoke orchestrator (`orchestrator.py`, ThreadPoolExecutor
fan-out) + a 663-LOC pass system (`passes.py`), running its 4-pass pipeline OFF the unified
workflow engine. To converge on one substrate (and gain the visual editor + parity tooling),
the pipeline must be re-expressed as a declarative engine workflow. The criteria-rubric prompts
and pass-system prompts ALREADY exist as `.md` files in `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/`
(`plan-review-finder`/`-verifier`/`-coach`/`-isf-finder`/`-container` + 33 criterion rubrics),
so this is WIRING existing prompts into a workflow, not authoring prompts.

## What

Author a v3 engine workflow (e.g. `.rebar/workflows/plan-review.yaml`) that expresses the
pipeline using existing step kinds + epic A's constructs: a `uses` DET precheck wrapping
`det_floor.py` (P1‚ÄìP9; only P1/P5/P8 block) ‚Üí an `overlay_triggers` precompute resolving the
T1‚ÄìT12 overlays + proportionate-scrutiny filter ‚Üí `batch` finders over the routed criteria
(using B1's production batch-runner) ‚Üí an aggregate `prompt` verify (Pass-2, ONE call) ‚Üí
a `uses`/`branch` deterministic decide (Pass-3) ‚Üí a `prompt` coach (Pass-4). The criteria list +
their `when` overlays are assembled from `registry.py` at workflow-render time (the deterministic
`_criterion_block()` assembly stays deterministic).

## Scope

- The `plan-review` workflow YAML + any new `uses` ops it needs (DET-precheck wrapper, registry‚Üí
  criteria assembly, decide, coach rendering) registered with input/output contracts.
- Reference existing library prompt ids; do NOT inline prompt text.
- Depends on B1 (production batch-runner). This story delivers the workflow + ops that PRODUCE a
  plan_review_verdict-shaped result OFFLINE (FakeAgentRunner); live cutover + signing is B5.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A v3 `plan-review` engine workflow expresses DET precheck (`uses`) ‚Üí overlay resolution ‚Üí
      `batch` finders ‚Üí aggregate `prompt` verify (one call) ‚Üí `uses`/`branch` decide ‚Üí `prompt`
      coach, referencing existing `reviewers/*.md` prompt ids.
- [ ] The Pass-1 criteria + their overlay `when` predicates are assembled from `registry.py`
      deterministically at render time; the production batch-runner (B1) drives the `batch` step.
- [ ] The workflow validates + lints clean and runs end-to-end OFFLINE (FakeAgentRunner) producing
      a plan_review_verdict-shaped result; a test exercises it.
- [ ] `make lint` + the full test suite pass.
data.title: B2: plan-review as an engine workflow (DET precheck -> batch finders -> verify -> decide -> coach)
